originalTitle: THE AMAZING DIGITAL CIRCUS - Ep 9: Alternate Ending | TADC Fan Animation
content: STREAM THIS SONG NOW ▶︎ https://ffm.to/the-amazing-digital-circus-main-theme-alternate After finding out what they truly are and that The Amazing Digital Circus is no more than Caine's creation, Pomni, Jax, Ragatha, Gangle, Zooble and Kinger cannot handle how meaningless their existence seems to be 🎪😨 I have so many original songs and covers that I can’t wait for you all to hear so make sure to like, subscribe and hit that notification bell! chineseContent: 现在就串流这首歌曲 ▶︎ https://ffm.to/the-amazing-digital-circus-main-theme-alternate 在了解了它们的真正含义以及神奇数字马戏团只不过是 Caine 的创作之后，Pomni、Jax、Ragatha、Gangle、Zooble 和 Kinger 无法应对它们的存在是多么毫无意义🎪😨 我有这么多原创歌曲和翻唱，我等不及了为了让大家都能听到，所以一定要喜欢、订阅并按下通知铃！感谢大家的支持，我感谢你们每一位♥️ ---------------------------------------------------------- 🤎 制作人员 🤎 🎵 歌曲：神奇数字马戏团主题曲（备用结局版本） 🎬 项目总监：@MilkyyMelodies 🎤 Pomni、Ragatha、Zooble 和 Gangle VA 和主唱：@MilkyyMelodies 🎤 Kinger & Caine VA 和主唱：@ForticGX 🎧 器乐：https://x.com/akello01375180 🎨 缩略图：https://x.com/DanyGersh 🖥️ 动画/后期处理：https://www.artstation.com/castroanimationstudio ✨ 灯光：https://x.com/DanyGersh & https://www.artstation.com/castroanimationstudio 👤 TADC 模型：@zayJax ⚙️ Zooble 零件：https://x.com/VictorL57688873 🏞️ 环境：@blueanimates & @luckymouth5500 🪣 Kinger's Bucket：@luckymouth5500 📧 业务咨询 - Milkyymelodies@gmail.com ------------------------------------------------------------------ 🎶 立即播放这首歌曲 🎶 Spotify：https://open.spotify.com/track/4VFTDlCamdXC5McWHqCrD2?si=3dab335ae9b54194 Apple Music： https://music.apple.com/gb/album/the-amazing-digital-circus-main-theme-alternate/6784961543 亚马逊音乐：https://music.amazon.co.uk/albums/B0H6P2L9HZ?ref=dm_sh_9al0QiM1yQffkOzsKVOlFn2bG Youtube 音乐： https://music.youtube.com/playlist?list=OLAK5uy_kOzCw7oNV-Elgl2c_7SXFbz6r_o5Li7UY iTunes：https://geo.music.apple.com/us/album/the-amazing-digital-circus-main
